english translation text: Ziyārah of Imam Husayn (A.S.)for Laylatul Qadr

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
O' Allāh send Your blessings on Muhammad
and the family of Muhammad.

In the Name of Allāh,
the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

arabic text: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ اللّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you; O son of Allah’s Messenger.
Peace be upon you; O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

arabic text: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ الصّدّيقَةِ الطَّاهِرَةِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you; O son of the veracious, immaculate lady
Fāṭimah, the Doyenne of the women of the world.

arabic text: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِاللّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you; O my master, Abū-`Abdullāh.
So be Allah’s mercy and blessings.
I bear witness that you offered the prayers,
And you defrayed the zakāt,
And you enjoined the right,
And you forbade the wrong,
And you recited the Book (i.e. the Holy Qur'ān) as exactly as it should be recited,
And you strove for the sake of Allah as exactly as striving must be,

arabic text: وَصَبَرْتَ عَلَى الأذَى فَي جَنْبِهِ مُحْتَسِباً حَتَّى أَتَاكَ الْيَقِينُ
english translation text: And you faced all troubles steadfastly for His sake, seeking his reward, until death came upon you.
I also bear witness that those who dissented you and those who fought against you
And those who let you down and those who slew you
All those were accursed directly by the Meccan Prophet.
And he who forges lies indeed fails to attain his desire.

arabic text: لَعَنَ اللّهُ الظَّالِمِينَ لَكُمْ مِنَ الأوَّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ
english translation text: May Allah remove blessings from those who wronged you from among the past and the present generations.
May Allah also double for them the painful torment.

arabic text: تَوَجَّهْتُ نَحْوَ مَشْهَدِك يَا مَوْلايَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ اللّهِ
english translation text: I turn my attention towards you, O my master, O son of the Messenger of Alláh,
Visiting you and acknowledging the standing that you enjoy,
And declaring my loyalty to those who are loyal to you,
And renouncing your enemies,
And seeking to follow the true guidance that you are following,
And recognizing the deviation of those who oppose you;
So, (please) intercede for me before your Lord.

arabic text: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجّةَ اللّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ وَسَمَائِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you; O the Argument of Allah in His lands and heavens.

arabic text: صَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَى رُوحِكَ الطّيّبِ وَجَسَدِكَ الطَّاهِرِ
english translation text: May Allah bless your immaculate spirit and your pure body.

arabic text: وَعَلَيْكَ السّلامُ يَا مَوْلايَ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ.
english translation text: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you; O my master.

Ziyárah of
Hazrat Alí Akbar (a.s.) for the Night of Qadr

arabic text: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ وَابْنَ مَوْلايَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you; O my master and son of my master
So be upon you Allah’s mercy and blessings.
May Allah remove blessings from those who wronged you.
May Allah remove blessings from those who slew you.
May Allah double the painful chastisement for them.

Ziyárah of
other Shuhadá (a.s.) for the Night of Qadr
Peace be upon you; O the veracious ones.
Peace be upon you; O the steadfast martyrs.

arabic text: أَشْهَدُ أَنّكُمْ جَاهَدْتُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ اللّهِ
english translation text: I bear witness that you strove in the way of Allah,

arabic text: وَصَبَرْتُمْ عَلَى الأذَى فِي جَنْبِ اللّهِ
english translation text: And you acted patiently against harm for the sake of Allah,

arabic text: وَنَصَحْتُمْ لِلّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ حَتَّى أَتَاكُمُ الْيَقِينُ
english translation text: And you did sincerely for the sake of Allah and His Messenger until death came upon you.

arabic text: أَشْهَدُ أَنّكُمْ أَحْيَاءٌ عِنْدَ رَبّكُمْ تُرْزَقُونَ
english translation text: I bear witness that you are alive and are being provided sustenance from your Lord.

arabic text: فَجَزَاكُمُ اللّهُ عَنِ الإسْلامِ وَأَهْلِهِ أَفْضَلَ جَزَاءِ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english translation text: May Allah reward you with the best reward of the good-doers on behalf of Islam and its people,

arabic text: وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمْ فِي مَحَلّ النّعِيمِ.
english translation text: And may He join us to you in the abode of bliss.

Ziyárah of
Hazrat Abbás (a.s.) for the Night of Qadr

arabic text: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you; O the son of the Commander of the Believers.
Peace be upon you; O the righteous servant (of Allah),
The obedient to Allah and to His Messenger.
I bear witness that you strove (in the way of Allah) and acted sincerely
And tolerated (harm) until death came upon you.

arabic text: لَعَنَ اللّهُ الظَّالِمِينَ لَكُمْ مِنَ الأوَّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ
english translation text: May Allah remove blessings from those who wronged you from the past and the present generations.
And may He send them to the lowest layer of the blazing Hell.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
O' Allāh send Your blessings on Muhammad
and the family of Muhammad.
